HomePage.title: Harmonia
HomePage.heroSubtitle: Smart management system and advanced learning experience for music conservatories

AvailableNow.title: Available lessons for today and tomorrow
AvailableNow.subtitle: Find a music lesson at a special price! A one-time opportunity to learn from the best teachers at discounts of up to 40%.

OpenDay.heroSubtitle: Come meet the teachers, try new instruments, and hear our students perform. A musical experience for the whole family!
OpenDay.featuresTitle: What awaits you at the Open Day?
OpenDay.feature1Desc: An opportunity to get to know our leading pedagogical team, ask questions, and receive personal guidance.
OpenDay.feature2Desc: Children can touch, feel, and play a variety of musical instruments with the guidance of our teachers.
OpenDay.feature3Desc: Watch our talented students showcase what they've learned in short concerts throughout the day.
OpenDay.formSubtitle: Book a personal introductory meeting. The number of spots is limited.
OpenDay.noSlots: All spots are taken. Try another date.
OpenDay.successDesc: Thank you for registering for the Open Day. A confirmation and further details have been sent to your email. We look forward to seeing you!

AdminOpenDay.title: Open Day Management
AdminOpenDay.subtitle: Track attendees and manage appointments for the Open Day event.

MusiciansForHire.heroSubtitle: All musicians from [Conservatory Name] — vetted, reliable, and fully insured.

features.experiencedDesc: Every musician is a professional teacher or advanced student from our conservatory.
features.backupDesc: If a musician cancels, we provide a replacement of equal or superior caliber, guaranteed.
features.professionalDesc: We handle all logistics, from booking to payment, for a seamless experience.

MusiciansForHire.occasionsSubtitle: From intimate ceremonies to large corporate events, we provide the perfect soundtrack.
MusiciansForHire.configuratorSubtitle: Configure your event needs and get a real-time price estimate instantly.
MusiciansForHire.musiciansSubtitle: A selection of our finest teachers and advanced students available for events.

DonatePage.heroTitle: Because music is not just for those who can afford it
DonatePage.heroSubtitle: Every donation, large or small, allows a talented child with financial difficulties to continue their musical journey. Together, we can give them a future.
DonatePage.storiesSubtitle: Behind every number is a story. Meet some of the students whose lives your donation can change.
DonatePage.story1Text: Maya comes from a single-parent family. The scholarship allows her to continue preparing for the Ministry of Education exams. Her teacher says she has real potential for a musical career.
DonatePage.story2Text: Yosef immigrated two years ago and faces integration challenges. Music is his refuge. Thanks to the scholarship, he can continue to play and develop his unique talent.
DonatePage.story3Text: Lian lives in the periphery, and access to quality lessons is limited. Your donation will allow her to continue attending lessons at the conservatory and fulfill her dream.
DonatePage.donateFormSubtitle: All donations are tax-deductible under Section 46. 100% of your donation goes directly to student scholarships.
DonatePage.help1: Funds two private lessons for a student.
DonatePage.help2: Covers almost a full month of studies.
DonatePage.help3: Funds an entire semester of music lessons.
DonatePage.dedicationPlaceholder: In honor of / In memory of...
DonatePage.anonymous: I prefer to remain anonymous (no receipt)

role.title: Who is registering?
role.subtitle: Fill in the details to join Harmonia.

toasts.waitlistAdminDesc: {name} added to the system and waitlist.
toasts.successUserDesc: Your request has been sent to the conservatory manager for approval.

matching.loading: Recommending the best teachers for you...
matching.noTeachersDesc: All teachers matching your preferences are currently busy. You can join the waitlist and we'll notify you when a spot opens up.
matching.goBack: Alternatively, you can go back and change your preferences.

success.adminDesc: The student has been added to the system and their profile can now be managed.
success.userDesc: Your request has been sent to the conservatory manager for approval. You will receive an email when your account is approved and you can log in to the system.

booking.title: Book First Lesson
booking.noSlots: No available slots found for this teacher on this date.

musical.title: Musical Info

descriptions.student: These are the last forms you submitted.
descriptions.teacher: These are the last forms submitted by your students.

descriptions.site_admin: These are all the last forms submitted in the system.

descriptions.parent: These are the last forms submitted for your children.
descriptions.default: Below are the latest form submissions.

makeups.title: Makeup Lessons
makeups.subtitle: Here you can see your makeup lesson balance and book a new lesson.

balanceCard.title: Makeup Lesson Balance
balanceCard.description: Available credits for makeup lessons due to teacher/system cancellations or your cancellations according to policy.

bookCard.title: Book a Makeup Lesson
bookCard.description: Use your credits to schedule a new lesson at a time that suits you.

details.title: Credit Details
details.empty: No credits available at the moment.

PendingApproval.title: Account Pending Approval
PendingApproval.description: Your registration has been successfully received! The conservatory team is currently reviewing your details.

steps.title: What happens next?
steps.review: The administration team is reviewing your registration form.
steps.contact: If necessary, we will contact you for additional information.
steps.notify: You will receive a confirmation message as soon as your account is activated and you can access the dashboard.

PendingApproval.support: Need help? Contact the office by phone or email.

MessagesPage.title: Messages
MessagesPage.subtitle: Communicate with students, parents, and teachers.

EventPage.recitalSubtitle: Join us for a special concert showcasing our talented students.
EventPage.concertSubtitle: An evening of fine music with our best performers.
EventPage.programSubtitle: The repertoire to be performed by our young artists.

HelpAssistant.title: Harmonia AI Assistant
HelpAssistant.description: Ask me anything about the system, and I'll do my best to help.
HelpAssistant.welcomeMessage: Hello! I'm Harmony, your AI assistant. How can I help you today?
HelpAssistant.errorMessage: I'm sorry, an error occurred. Please try again later.
